fix_summary: The proposed change correctly inverts the flight search sort selection so `sort_by=price` orders by ascending price and the default path orders by departure time. The automated tests passed, and the change remains localized to the service-layer ordering logic with focused regression tests.
approval_reasons: The diff directly fixes the named bug in `backend/app/services/flight_service.py` by swapping the sort dispatch condition.
The added tests verify both requested behaviors: explicit price sorting and default departure-time sorting.
